title: aws-ssm build_ssm_client uses unwrap() not expect(); inconsistent with aws-sm
description: What is unclear: aws-ssm/src/lib.rs:60 uses result.unwrap() where aws-sm uses result.expect('scope always sets result before exiting'). The invariant is the same: thread::scope guarantees the thread is joined, so result is always Some. The expect message explains why the panic is theoretically unreachable — the unwrap does not. A contributor reading aws-ssm won't see the explanation and may not understand why it's safe. Fix: use the same expect message as aws-sm.
